nasb.text: “You shall bring the choice first fruits of your soil into the house of the Lord your God. “You are not to boil a young goat in the milk of its mother.

esv.text: “The best of the firstfruits of your ground you shall bring into the house of the Lord your God. “You shall not boil a young goat in its mother’s milk.

cnv.text: 要把你地上最上好的初熟之物帶到耶和華你　神的殿中。不可用山羊羔母的奶去煮山羊羔。

ccb.text: 要把田中最好的初熟之物送到你们的上帝耶和华的殿中。不可用母山羊的奶煮它的小羊羔。
